1. ava-√jñā -jānāti (ind.p. -jñāya; perf. Pass. -jajñe,  Bhaṭṭ. )
to disesteem, have a low opinion of, despise, treat with contempt,  MBh.  &c.;
to excel,  Kāvyād.

results.rendered_html: avajñā (von jñā mit ava) f. Verachtung, Geringachtung  AK. 1,1,7,23 .  TRIK. 1,1,128 .  H. 1479 .  R. 3,49,52 .  HIT. 92,3 . Das subj. im gen.  BHARTṚ. 3,38 . geht im comp. voran  PAÑCAT. I, 355 . Das obj. im loc.: na khalvavajñā kartavyā ripāvapi durbale  R. 3,33,17 . 6,33,2 .  HIT. 16,14 . ātmanyavajñāṃ śithilīcakāra  RAGH. 2,41 . im gen.: pareṣāṃ sahasāvajñā na kartavyā  R. 5,80,12 . yadete sādhūnāmupari vimukhāḥ santi dhanino na caiṣāvajñaiṣāmapi tu nijavittavyayabhayam  ŚĀNTIŚ. 3,23 . sāvajñam adv. mit Verachtung  R. 3,32,9 .  DHŪRTAS. 84,7 .

results.rendered_html: avajñā 9 P. To have a low opinion of, to despise, to treat with contempt, disregard; avajānāsi māṃ yasmāt  R. 1. 77 ; avajānaṃti māṃ mūḍhā mānuṣīṃ tanumāśritaṃ  Bg. 9. 11 ;  Bk. 3. 8.

results.rendered_html:
avajñā [ava-jñā-aṅ] Disrespect, contempt; slighting, low opinion; nātmanyavajñā kartavyā  H. 1 ; disregard (with the obj. in loc. or gen.);
(pb) ātmanyavajñāṃ śithilīcakāra  R. 2. 41 ; ye nāma kecidiha naḥ prathayaṃtyavajñāṃ  Māl. 1. 6 ;  Śānti. 3. 23 ; avijñāvajñeyaṃ paritapati noccairapi budhaṃ  Udb. 
Comp.
— upahata a. treated with contempt, humiliated.
— duḥkhaṃ the agonies of humiliation; mā jīvan yaḥ parāvajñāduḥkhadagdhopi jīvati  Śi. 2. 45.
